w9:taxClassification.label: Federal tax classification
w9:taxClassification.so: Tani waa nooca ganacsi ee aad sheegtay — tusaale ahaan qof keligiis leh ganacsi (individual/sole proprietor) ama shirkad (corporation). Shirkaddu waxay isticmaalaysaa nooca si ay u ogaato sida loo soo wargeliyo dakhliga aad ka heshay.
w9:taxClassification.en: This is the type of business entity you identified yourself as — for example, an individual/sole proprietor versus a corporation. The company paying you uses this to know how to report your income.
